description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a modern, blocky architectural design, featuring multiple levels and a flat roof. The facade is primarily composed of gray concrete or stone, with large, regularly spaced windows and several balconies visible on the longer sides. The building sits on a rectangular plot with paved driveways and small green areas, and there are several small outbuildings and a parked vehicle adjacent to the main structure. The front entrance is accessible via a wide walkway, and the building appears to have at least five stories, with the uppermost level set back from the main facade. The side of the building features a large mural or decorative panel, adding visual interest to the otherwise utilitarian exterior. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary urban residential complex designed for multiple families.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with a flat roof, gray facade, large windows, and balconies, set on a paved lot with adjacent outbuildings and green areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, and several small outbuildings and a vehicle in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade with rows of windows and balconies, as well as the setback upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear or side angle showing a large mural or decorative panel and the building's blocky structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the balconies, windows, and the paved area with outbuildings and a vehicle.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in regular, horizontal rows with consistent spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly pattern across the facade. Some windows are grouped with balconies, while others are standalone.
